flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Texas Christian University rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($51.7k → $61.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Texas Christian University rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($51.7k → $61.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Texas Christian University rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 ($12.1k → $14.4k).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Texas Christian University are 28% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($68.4k vs $53.4k).
